LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PEAK WEB HOSTING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION TO DELINEATE ANY OTHER SUMS PLAINTIFF CONTENDS ARE DUE BEYOND UNPAID RENT. OVERRULED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. ADDITIONAL FACTS NEED NOT BE PLEAD. (MOVING PARTY MAY SUBMIT PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
